title: LCX8 P2-T04 Matter component/API action source trace
scope: Trace MattersSurface, MatterVaultPanel, MatterOpeningWizard, MatterTeamRoster, ImportDataMappingPanel, shared Panel, and apiClient boundaries into Matter rows. Backfill sidebar-reachable Matter team/billing/analytics/import visible actions that were absent from the S1 Matter ledger. Statuses remain pre-P3/P4 classifications.

lazyweb_reference.use: Reference only; local Matter source/API trace drives classifications.

anchors.description: MATTER_SECTIONS and MATTER_WORK_TABS define Matter sections and top tabs
renderCollectionState/renderCommandState map denied/review/error/empty states
MatterRecordPanel inline edit, owner change, record-action field update, and owner-blocked actions
Matter list views, bulk action bar, selectable rows, and local list state
Activity, calendar/deadline, and channel workspaces with write handlers
Matter billing and analytics action panels
Matter read effects for records/list views/record-actions/legal people/active matter/finance/analytics
Matter write handlers for finance, status, inline edits, owner change, record-actions, activity, calendar, channel, list view, analytics
Current section rendering for Matter list, command, vault, timeline, calendar, channel, opening, team, billing, analytics, import, and right panel
Vault summary/timeline/documents/search/audit/templates/approvals read effect
Document facade, builder draft, approval, publish, email draft, and send-boundary handlers
Visible document builder and email composer action buttons
Matter Vault refresh and document connection buttons
Matter opening payload and permission/audit refs
form submit calls createMatterOpening
visible Matter opening inputs and submit button
Matter team member payload and permission/audit refs
team form submit calls addMatterTeamMember and updates Matter owner assignment
visible team inputs, role select, and submit button
surface="matter" targets matter_runtime_patch import jobs
import read effects and job/source/mapping/dry-run/execute/rollback handlers
visible import action buttons
Panel renders shared overflow icon-button without handler
Matter list/read helpers and generic Matter runtime write/read helpers
Import data targets/jobs/source/preview/mapping/dry-run/execute/rollback/error-report API clients
Record-action runtime, fields/audit reads, field-update and bulk-update writes
Matter opening/team/list-view/status/owner/inline/document API clients
Matter document-builder, email draft, status, and recently-viewed API clients
Matter activity/calendar/deadline/channel/command-center/vault summary/audit/timeline API clients
Matter-filtered Vault documents/search/audit read helpers
Finance read/write API clients used by Matter billing
Analytics dashboard/profitability/export API clients used by Matter analytics

row_updates.label: 새로고침
row_updates.handler: PageHeader onClick -> setRefreshToken(value + 1); MattersSurface effects re-run Matter list/list-view/record-action/legal-people/active-matter/finance/analytics reads
row_updates.api_route: GET /api/matters; GET /api/matters/list-views; GET /api/record-actions/matter/fields; GET /api/record-actions/matter/:record_id/audit; GET /api/hrx/legal-people/search?matter_id=:matter_id; GET /api/matters/:matter_id/command-center; GET /api/matters/:matter_id/timeline; GET /api/matters/audit; GET /api/matters/recently-viewed; GET /api/finance/time-entries; GET /api/finance/invoices; GET /api/finance/ar-aging; GET /api/finance/audit; GET /api/analytics/dashboards; GET /api/analytics/matter-profitability
row_updates.outcome: API-backed action remains BLOCKED pending P3/P4 proof
